data.body: USER REQUEST: added story 121b-32f3-a2f0-48b4 (snugging-demurrable-elephant) to epic — make rebar metrics usable+discoverable: teach rebar-janitor (examples/agent-skills/rebar-janitor/phases/discovery.md) to consult 'rebar metrics' for code-health-lens evidence, + docs discoverability (docs/user-guide Metrics section, docs/reuse-surface rebar.metrics ref, AGENTS.md where-to-read pointer). Non-code (skill md + docs). depends_on 9a5a redirected to epic (sibling blocking-link promotion) -> unlinked, used relates_to 9a5a instead; will implement AFTER 9a5a in stack. Epic now 1 story + 15 tasks. Needs plan-review before claim like others.
